title: Suspected Duplicate Charge - Whole Foods Market
description: Cardholder reports being charged twice for a grocery purchase at Whole Foods Market on 2024-03-15. First charge of $127.43 posted on 3/15, second charge of $127.43 posted on 3/16. Cardholder states they only made one visit to the store.

title: Pending Authorization Not Released - Hilton Hotels
description: Cardholder checked out of Hilton Garden Inn on 2024-03-10 but a $450.00 authorization hold from check-in on 2024-03-07 has not been released. The actual room charge of $387.50 has settled. Cardholder is concerned about the additional hold reducing available credit.

title: Refund Not Received - Amazon.com
description: Cardholder returned an item to Amazon on 2024-02-28 and received a refund confirmation email with ARN REF-AMZ-20240228-7741. As of 2024-03-18, the refund of $89.99 has not posted to the account. Amazon customer service confirms refund was processed on 2024-03-01.

title: Settlement Delay - Delta Air Lines
description: Cardholder purchased airline tickets on 2024-02-20 for $1,247.00. Authorization was approved but the transaction has not settled after 25 days. The flight is scheduled for 2024-04-15. Cardholder is concerned the charge is still pending.

title: Partial Reversal Confusion - Best Buy
description: Cardholder purchased a laptop and accessories totaling $1,899.97 at Best Buy on 2024-03-12. They returned the accessories ($342.98) on 2024-03-14. A partial credit of $342.98 posted, but the original charge still shows $1,899.97 instead of $1,556.99. Cardholder believes they are being overcharged.

title: Merchant Descriptor Mismatch - Uber Eats
description: Cardholder does not recognize a charge of $47.82 posted on 2024-03-16 from 'UBER *EATS PENDING'. They confirm using Uber for rides but deny using Uber Eats. Transaction appears to be from a different merchant descriptor than expected.

title: High-Value Duplicate Charge - Luxury Auto Service
description: Cardholder reports two identical charges of $8,750.00 from 'Premium Auto Service Center' on 2024-03-13 and 2024-03-14. Cardholder confirms only one service appointment. Amount exceeds standard auto-resolution threshold.

title: Multiple Pending Authorizations - Enterprise Rent-A-Car
description: Cardholder has three pending authorizations from Enterprise Rent-A-Car: $275.00 (3/5), $275.00 (3/8), and $412.50 (3/12). Only one rental agreement exists. The final settlement should be $412.50 for a 7-day rental with fuel charge.

title: Insufficient Evidence - Disputed Gas Station Charge
description: Cardholder disputes a $92.14 charge at Shell Gas Station on 2024-03-17, claiming they did not visit that location. No additional details provided. Account shows regular gas purchases at various locations.

title: Refund Amount Exceeds Original - Nordstrom
description: A refund of $234.50 posted from Nordstrom on 2024-03-15, but the original transaction was $189.99 on 2024-02-28. The refund exceeds the original charge by $44.51. This requires immediate review per policy POL-TXN-003 Section 2.2.
